title: Senior Advertising and Promotion (A&P) Executive
description:
Responsibilities

  • Assist to assess market opportunities and conduct research to understand customer needs
  • Enhance customers experience through mall-wide promotions and events to drive shoppers’ traffic and increase tenant sales
  • Source for potential licensees to drive the mall’s Advertising & Promotion revenue through the booking of atrium spaces, road show spaces and ad spaces
  • Conceptualize, plan, develop and implement campaigns on annual marketing calendar effectively on a timely manner.
  • Support in developing, tracking and managing marketing budget
  • Plan, execute and manage advertising, promotion and digital marketing strategies
  • Build and maintain good relationship with tenants and garner their participation in the mall’s advertising & promotion activities
  • Liaise and collaborate with partners, sponsors, advertising agencies, tenants, contractors and event companies to ensure successful launches of all projects and events
  • Analyse, evaluate and report effectiveness of advertising & promotion activities, make recommendations to adjust marketing strategies
  • Liaise with respective vendors to ensure timely publicity of stores listing, happenings & promotions on various platforms: website in mall directories social media management inclusive of content management, contest, feedback & comments.
  • Undertake other administrative deliverables such as financial processes, procurement, competitive quote sourcing and operational coordination, when required.
  • Support in ad hoc designs for posters, decals, signages, and displays, when required.
  • Such other duties and responsibilities as may be reasonably requested by immediate supervisor / the head of department from time to time.

Requirements

  • Degree in Marketing / Mass Communications or relevant discipline
  • Prior experience in retail mall marketing, events management, digital marketing and Social Media marketing will be an advantage
  • Proficiency in Design software (eg. Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva, etc)
  • Good knowledge in digital marketing, including social media platforms management, paid media buy and analytics
  • Excellent communication skills with ability to communicate clearly and effectively, both verbally and in writing
  • Able to work independently as well as part of a team in a constantly evolving environment
  • Self-motivated, highly resourceful, positive and proactive, and with these traits, thrive on challenges and time pressures in a fast-paced environment.
  • Strong communication, interpersonal, analytical and problem-solving skills

How to Apply:

Interested applicants, kindly click on “APPLY NOW”

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Important Note: Trust Recruit Pte Ltd is committed to safeguarding your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).

Please read our privacy statement on our corporate website www.trustrecruit.com.sg.

Trust Recruit is Singapore’s leading relationship-based human resource and recruitment firm.


With more than 20 years of collective consulting experience, we provide personalized workforce solutions for our corporate clients, ranging from multinational corporations to the public sector, as well as small and medium enterprises.


At Trust Recruit, integrity and reliability permeate every level of our recruitment process.


TRUST is our currency of interactions; be it with our valued clients, talented job-seekers, or our own employees. Through our premium staffing services, we are committed to connecting and developing quality relationships between candidates and companies.
